sentences.english: Hello. Welcome to The English We Speak, where we explain phrases used by fluent English speakers so that you can use them too.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요. 유창한 영어 화자들이 쓰는 표현을 설명하는 The English We Speak에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

sentences.english: I'm Feifei, and I'm here with Phil.
sentences.korean: 저는 페이페이이고, 필과 함께합니다.

sentences.english: Hello. How are you, Feifei?
sentences.korean: 안녕. 잘 지내, 페이페이?

sentences.english: Have you been busy?
sentences.korean: 바빴어?

sentences.english: How can you tell?
sentences.korean: 어떻게 알았어?

quiz.question: What does '힘든 일, 어려운 과제' mean in English?

sentences.english: Yes, I have. I've been trying to sort out all the photos I've taken over the last few years - but there are so many!
sentences.korean: 응, 지난 몇 년간 찍은 사진들을 정리하려고 했는데 너무 많아! 어떤 걸 출력할지 고르는 건 정말 힘든 일이야.

sentences.english: Choosing which ones to print out really is an uphill task.
sentences.korean: 추징 위치 원즈 투 프린트 아웃 리얼리 이즈 언 업힐 태스크.

sentences.english: I don't even want to think about sorting out the pictures on my phone, but I do want to think about that phrase you used - 'an uphill task'.
sentences.korean: 핸드폰 사진 정리는 생각하고 싶지도 않지만, 네가 쓴 'an uphill task'라는 표현에 대해선 생각해보고 싶어.

sentences.english: We use it to talk about something difficult.
sentences.korean: 어려운 일을 말할 때 써.

sentences.english: So, think about walking up a steep hill.
sentences.korean: 가파른 언덕을 올라가는 걸 상상해봐.

quiz.question: What does '결단력, 의지' mean in English?

sentences.english: It takes a lot of energy and effort, doesn't it?
sentences.korean: 에너지와 노력이 많이 들잖아?

sentences.english: So, an uphill task is something that's difficult and takes a lot of energy.
sentences.korean: 그래서 uphill task는 어렵고 에너지가 많이 드는 일이야.

sentences.english: I've literally got thousands of pictures to sort through.
sentences.korean: 정리해야 할 사진이 진짜 수천 장이거든.

sentences.english: That definitely sounds like an uphill task!
sentences.korean: 확실히 힘든 일 같아!

sentences.english: Any task that looks as if it's going to take a very long time, or where success seems very unlikely, can be described as 'uphill'.
sentences.korean: 매우 오래 걸리거나 성공이 어려워 보이는 일은 'uphill'로 묘사할 수 있어.

sentences.english: We also often use it when there is something working against us.
sentences.korean: 방해되는 것이 있을 때도 자주 써.

sentences.english: So, if I fix something in my home, there's always something else that goes wrong straight afterwards.
sentences.korean: 집에서 뭔가를 고치면, 항상 바로 뒤에 다른 게 또 고장나거든.

sentences.english: Keeping everything OK just feels like an uphill task.
sentences.korean: 모든 걸 제대로 유지하는 것만으로도 힘든 일처럼 느껴져.

sentences.english: Oh Phil, you're doing really well dealing with all the uphill tasks in life.
sentences.korean: 필, 인생의 힘든 일들을 잘 해내고 있어.

sentences.english: Here are some more examples of people using 'an uphill task'.
sentences.korean: 사람들이 'an uphill task'를 쓰는 예시를 더 들어보자.

quiz.question: What does '힘든 일, 어려운 과제' mean in English?

sentences.english: Sorting out my unread emails is such an uphill task.
sentences.korean: 읽지 않은 이메일 정리하는 건 정말 힘든 일이야.

sentences.english: As soon as I delete the ones I haven't read, more come in.
sentences.korean: 안 읽은 걸 지우자마자 더 들어오거든.

sentences.english: I'm going on holiday next week, and I've got so much to do before I go.
sentences.korean: 다음 주에 휴가를 가는데, 가기 전에 할 일이 너무 많아.

sentences.english: Getting it all done is such an uphill task.
sentences.korean: 다 끝내는 건 정말 힘든 일이야.

sentences.english: I've got so many lines to memorise for a play this weekend.
sentences.korean: 이번 주말 연극을 위해 외워야 할 대사가 너무 많아.

quiz.question: What does '힘든 투쟁, 고된 노력' mean in English?

sentences.english: It's such an uphill task.
sentences.korean: 정말 힘든 일이야.

sentences.english: You're listening to The English We Speak, and we're talking about the phrase 'an uphill task'.
sentences.korean: The English We Speak을 듣고 계시고, 'an uphill task'에 대해 얘기하고 있어요.

sentences.english: Phil, I think we can use other words to replace 'task', can't we?
sentences.korean: 필, 'task' 대신 다른 단어도 쓸 수 있잖아?

sentences.english: Yes, we can use 'uphill' with 'struggle' or 'battle' and it has this same idea - that it will take a lot of determination to complete it.
sentences.korean: 맞아, 'uphill'을 'struggle'이나 'battle'과 함께 써도 같은 의미야 — 완수하려면 많은 결단력이 필요하다는 거지.

sentences.english: So, for example, it was an uphill struggle for me to write my thesis.
sentences.korean: 예를 들어, 논문 쓰는 건 힘든 투쟁이었어.

quiz.question: What does '힘든 투쟁, 고된 노력' mean in English?

sentences.english: OK, so we've learnt 'an uphill task' – something which is very difficult and takes a lot of energy.
sentences.korean: 좋아, 'an uphill task'를 배웠어 — 매우 어렵고 에너지가 많이 드는 일.

sentences.english: Time for me to get back to sorting my photos, that uphill task!
sentences.korean: 이제 사진 정리하러 가야겠다, 그 힘든 일!

sentences.english: See you later.
sentences.korean: 나중에 봐.

sentences.english: Bye!
sentences.korean: 안녕!

quiz.question: What does '가능성이 낮은' mean in English?
